name: journalism_staffing_model_assigns_overtime_mesa_tru_loy
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Journalism, the situation tagged internally around journalism staffing model assigns overtime mesa tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge.
